/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.9 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.9 -nostdlib -Wl,-kext -Wl,-no_uuid -lkmodc++ -lkmod CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/MT2Gesture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/MT2GestureUserClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/MT2BTReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/MT2USBReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/mt2_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/gh_default_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_bt_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt1_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_usb_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_lifecycle.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_session.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_geometry.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_usb_reframe.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_connect_sm.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/conn_trace.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/genuine_host.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_coordinator.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2gesture_kext.dir/__/src/mt2_battery.c.o -o MT2Gesture
